---
title: "PREVENT-AD Family History"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(ggpubr)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')
source(CRS_FN)

dat_fhx <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_fhx_dat.rds"))
biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_biomarkers.rds"))
PREVENTAD_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_dat.rds"))
```

# Family history histograms
```{r}
hist1 <- ggplot(dat_fhx, aes(x=var2)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=1, stat="count")
hist1

hist2 <- ggplot(dat_fhx, aes(x=other_family_members_AD)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=1)
hist2
```

# Checking association of family history burden and biomarker levels
## Recoded family history variable vs biomarker levels
```{r}
df1 <- dat_fhx %>%
  filter(CONP_ID %in% baseline_biomarkers$CONP_ID) %>%
  left_join((biomarkers %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice(1)),
            by="CONP_ID") 
  
df1_longer <- df1 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = biomarker_cols,
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) %>%
  select(names(dat_fhx), biomarker, measure) %>%
  mutate(fhx_burden = factor(fhx_burden,
                             levels=c(1, 2, 3),
                             labels=c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))) %>%
  mutate(ext_relatives_AD = factor(ext_relatives_AD,
                                   levels=c(0, 1),
                                   labels=c("No", "Yes"))) %>%
  mutate(FDRAD_1ormore = factor(FDRAD_1ormore,
                       levels=c(1, 2),
                       labels=c("1 FDR",
                                "2+ FDR"))) %>%
  mutate(FDR_ext_AD = factor(FDR_ext_AD,
                       levels=c(1, 2, 3, 4),
                       labels=c("1 FDR", "1 FDR + ext", "2+ FDR", "2+ FDR + ext")))

pval_df1 <- df1_longer %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ fhx_burden))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot1 <- ggplot(df1_longer, aes(x=fhx_burden, y=measure, fill=fhx_burden)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  # stat_compare_means(
  #   comparisons = list(c("Low", "Moderate"),
  #                      c("Moderate", "High"),
  #                      c("Low", "High")),
  #   method="t.test",
  #   p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",
  #   label.x=1.5,
  #   size = 1.5
  # ) +
  geom_text(data = pval_df1,
            aes(2, Inf, label = p_label),
            vjust = 2,
            size = 3,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # stat_compare_means(method="anova",
  #                    #hjust=2,
  #                    #vjust=2,
  #                    size=3) +
  labs(x = "Family History Burden Level",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by AD Family History Burden") +
  theme(legend.position="none")
plot1

#ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_fhx_vs_BBM_var1.png"), plot1)
```


## Binary extended family members variable vs biomarker levels
```{r}
pval_df2 <- df1_longer %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ ext_relatives_AD))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot2 <- ggplot(df1_longer, aes(x=ext_relatives_AD, 
                                y=measure, 
                                fill=ext_relatives_AD)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  # stat_compare_means(
  #   # comparisons = list(c("Low", "Moderate"),
  #   #                    c("Moderate", "High"),
  #   #                    c("Low", "High")),
  #   method="wilcox.test",
  #   #label.x=1.5,
  #   size = 2
  # ) + 
  geom_text(data = pval_df2,
            aes(1.5, Inf, label = p_label),
            vjust = 2,
            size = 3,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Extended Relatives with AD",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by AD in Extended Family") +
  theme(legend.position="none")
plot2

ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_fhx_vs_BBM_var2_filtered.png"), plot2)
```

## Number of extended family members with AD vs biomarker levels
```{r}
pval_df3 <- df1_longer %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ other_family_members_AD))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot3 <- ggplot(df1_longer, aes(x=as.factor(other_family_members_AD), 
                                y=measure, 
                                fill=as.factor(other_family_members_AD))) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha=0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  # stat_compare_means(
  #   # comparisons = list(c("Low", "Moderate"),
  #   #                    c("Moderate", "High"),
  #   #                    c("Low", "High")),
  #   method="wilcox.test",
  #   #label.x=1.5,
  #   size = 2
  # ) + 
  geom_text(data = pval_df3,
            aes(4, Inf, label = p_label),
            vjust = 2,
            size = 3,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "# of Extended Relatives with AD",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by AD in Extended Family") +
  theme(legend.position="none")
plot3

# ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_fhx_vs_BBM_var3.png"), plot3)
```


## 1 vs 2+ FDR and BBM
```{r}
pval_df4 <- df1_longer %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ FDRAD_1ormore))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot4 <- ggplot(df1_longer, aes(x=as.factor(FDRAD_1ormore), 
                                y=measure, 
                                fill=as.factor(FDRAD_1ormore))) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  # stat_compare_means(
  #   # comparisons = list(c("Low", "Moderate"),
  #   #                    c("Moderate", "High"),
  #   #                    c("Low", "High")),
  #   method="wilcox.test",
  #   #label.x=1.5,
  #   size = 2
  # ) + 
  geom_text(data = pval_df4,
            aes(Inf, Inf, label = p_label),
            vjust = 2,
            hjust = 3,
            size = 3,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "FDR AD",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by Number of FDR with AD") +
  theme(legend.position="none")
plot4

ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_fhx_vs_BBM_var4_filtered.png"), plot4)
```


## 1 vs 2+ FDR + extended family members with AD and BBM
```{r}
pval_df5 <- df1_longer %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ FDR_ext_AD))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot5 <- ggplot(df1_longer, aes(x=as.factor(FDR_ext_AD), 
                                y=measure, 
                                fill=as.factor(FDR_ext_AD))) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  # stat_compare_means(
  #   # comparisons = list(c("Low", "Moderate"),
  #   #                    c("Moderate", "High"),
  #   #                    c("Low", "High")),
  #   method="wilcox.test",
  #   #label.x=1.5,
  #   size = 2
  # ) + 
  geom_text(data = pval_df5,
            aes(Inf, Inf, label = p_label),
            vjust = 2,
            hjust = 1,
            size = 3,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Family History AD",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by FDR + Extended Family Members with AD") +
  theme(legend.position="none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))
plot5

ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_fhx_vs_BBM_var5_filtered.png"), plot5)
```
